notes.note: Spoke to the SP, check-in call done. Asked her to work on reviews, as she hasn't received any reviews for the month of May so far. The SP told that she is not keeping well and will reach out once she feels better.

candidate_facts.value: Service provider not keeping well and unavailable; no reviews received in May.
